productDisplayName: Baggit Women Taker Jhuti Beige Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards, mobile phone and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Dimensions: 19 cm x 11 cm Created from jute with genuine leatherette trims One main zippered compartment with a fabric separator A press button closure for a flap that opens to two folds Six card holder slots on both sides of folds and a pocket on the right A zippered compartment at the back Two short jute handles Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
